---
title: "Writing"
description: "Articles on cybersecurity training, offensive security, and military aviation."
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: posts
    type: table
    fields: [date, title, description]
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: true
    date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
    table-striped: false
    table-hover: true
    feed:
      title: "Brandon Russell, Writing"
      type: full
---

I publish on [Medium](https://medium.com/@brandon.r.russell.1). Peer-reviewed and trade publications are listed on [Publications](publications.qmd).

## Posts

::: {#posts}
:::

## Topics I write about

Cybersecurity education, training program design, offensive security operations, military aviation systems, the transition from military to academic and consulting careers, and occasionally cognitive science, the philosophy of education, and systems thinking.
